steps.title: Substitute into the denominator
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=\dfrac{1}{8x}$. When $x=4$, the denominator is 8 times 4, not 8 plus 4.

steps.title: Simplify the fraction
steps.content:
$$f(4)=\dfrac{1}{8(4)}=\dfrac{1}{32}$$
The expression equals one over the product 32, so D is correct. Choice C uses $\dfrac{1}{12}$, which comes from adding $8+4$ instead of multiplying.
